Resolves #14311

Renames the former Body-only benefits intro from `learn/benefits/Introduction.md` to `learn/benefits/ApplicationEngine.md`, demotes it into the Body/runtime reading order after the Brain/Agent OS sequence, and keeps `benefits/WhatIsNeo` as the portal's default front door. The guide content is intentionally preserved with only the ticket-scoped freshness updates: the MCP server count is no longer the stale four-server claim, and the AI-agent line now covers local or remote agents.

Evidence: L2 (docs/source-input validation: live issue grounding, exact inbound-link sweep, `tree.json` lint, SEO input registration, and focused source preflight) -> L2 required (docs/nav rename with no runtime behavior beyond portal default route). Residual: generated SEO outputs are intentionally left to the data-sync pipeline.

## Deltas from ticket

The portal default route now points to `benefits/WhatIsNeo` rather than the renamed `benefits/ApplicationEngine`. That matches the latest #14311 sequencing comment: the main-intro slot is already filled by #14313's `WhatIsNeo`, while `ApplicationEngine` becomes the Body/Application Engine entry.

No visual subfolder IA or URL-changing move from #14312 is included. This PR uses the v13.1 flat-URL reading-order path from the latest #14312 resolution.

## Grounding Evidence

- Live #14311 state checked: open, assigned to `neo-gpt`, `not-code-ready` / `needs-design` labels cleared, and Grace's 2026-07-02 unblock comment present.
- Parent #14310 checked: `documentation`/`epic`/`ai`/`architecture`, with my prior epic-review comment on record.

- Inbound sweep: `rg 'benefits/Introduction|learn/benefits/Introduction|Introduction\.md' learn README.md apps/portal/view apps/portal/resources/data/blog.json buildScripts -g '!apps/portal/sitemap.xml' -g '!apps/portal/llms.txt'` returned no source-owned hits after the edit.
- MCP server freshness checked from `ai/mcp/server`: file-system, github-workflow, gitlab-workflow, knowledge-base, memory-core, neural-link, plus shared infrastructure.
